text.message: Why u gotta do that oj?
Honestly I thought the other spots would be closed off, thought it would be my only direction of a possibility, was still planning to go 3:1 first
You don’t even need that spot , you could have just taken the 10/5/2
Whats the point of then plowing me?
Ur mad at me plowing u before u could plow me… haha
I should be focused on him
throwing the game because you lost a race you chose is crazy work
And that 8 4 with port  was always going to be taken
you are throwing, dont pretend ur not
Let the record show I am not
Hes mad he lost a race he chose
it's really extreme, even for this site
Maybe i just wanted the 10 open for that exact purpose
just wanna extend one road, blue
on the off chance that black has 3 vps
Ill see if he has knight first
if he doesn't, he wins with two raods
How do I build 2 roads this turn?
Yeah for sure, I am definitely in the lead
Gonna have to solo you for that comment
Lol u have been all game
But you made me do it again
it's def oj. not sure what black was doing
Actually we gotta see if black has a knight
yeah 3 players going for road, oj can't lose
two non knights, 7 points showing, and "cant win"
Handed it to blue on a silver platter form the start, I am the only one that was fighting him
bro CHOSE a race and then lost his mind when he lost it
Black all you do is complain!
